ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., microarray, RNA sequencing, qPCR) */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., public database, in-house experiment) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the sample (e.g., Dox, control) */,
  "time_point" REAL /* Time point at which the sample was collected (e.g., 0h, 12h, 24h) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample (e.g., human, mouse) */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample was taken from (e.g., liver, brain) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality control score for the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "protein_function" TEXT /* Brief description of the protein's function */,
  "protein_type" TEXT /* Type of protein (e.g., structural, enzymatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the expression data belongs to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the expression data is for */,
  "time" REAL /* Time point at which the expression data was measured */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene at the given time point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the expression data (e.g., microarray, RNA sequencing) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality control score for the expression data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the expression data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_data" (
  "protein_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the protein data belongs to */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the protein data is for */,
  "time" REAL /* Time point at which the protein data was measured */,
  "protein_level" REAL /* Level of the protein at the given time point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the protein data (e.g., mass spectrometry, Western blot) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality control score for the protein data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the protein data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_data_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, postdoc, graduate student) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Normalization" (
  "Normalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each normalization value */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the normalization value belongs to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the normalization value is for */,
  "Normalization_value" REAL /* Normalization value for the gene expression data */,
  "normalization_method" TEXT /* Method used for normalization (e.g., TMM, RPKM) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the normalization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Normalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Normalization_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Normalization_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
